messages.content: 作为一个数据科学家的简历，翻译一下下面这段“Own the design, and development of tracking events, metrics, reports, analyses, dashboards, to drive key business decisions and leverage the vast data sets to model out in-game behavior patterns to uncover potential actionable opportunities”
负责跟踪事件、指标、报告、分析、仪表盘的设计和开发，以支持关键的商业决策，并利用大量数据集对游戏内行为模式进行建模，以发现可能的可行机会。
翻译的更符合互联网行业的术语一点
负责设计和开发数据追踪事件、关键指标、报表、分析和数据面板，支撑关键业务决策。利用大数据集建模游戏内用户行为模式，挖掘潜在的可执行机会。

接下来的翻译会有更多的数据科学专业术语，其中引号内的参数，包裹，模型的名称可以不用翻译，“BI Administration& Management        
•	Started everything from scratch. Developed and Administrated Sisense (BI) Data warehouse (ElastiCubes), relational schemas and designed visualized, interactive dashboards to analyze Branch Portfolio, Loan/Share Product Portfolio, Business Services Reporting, Member Solutions Dashboard, Rogue Credit Union KPI, etc. which provided actionable insights to the leadership team and other stakeholders efficiently. 
Predictive Analytics: Charge off Prediction Analysis (Highly Risky Member Forecasting)
•	Led Member Solutions Team to implement charge-off prediction analysis which impressively saved months of time to call the Highly Risky Members and also saved $100,000+ to hire more member solution specialists.
•	Applied KNN for missing value imputation, especially for charge-offs observations and Recursive Feature Elimination for feature selection, identified, and selected key indicators such as Delinquency, Credit Score Changes, Revolving Utilization, DTI, Loan History, and improved Specificity to 94.48% with under sampling to the majority class, tune grid and optimizing RF with ‘mtry=9’ using ‘dplyr’ and ‘caret’. 
K-Means Clustering Analysis: New Credit Tiers Categorization and Exploration
•	Collected Credit Soft pull data from SQL Server, and created new features like Revolving Balance Utilization, Total Trade Balance, DQ, etc.
•	Visualized the Clusters using fviz_cluster function, and ‘ggplot2’. Failed implementing ‘Average Silhouette’, ‘Elbow Method’ to find optimal clusters because of machine capability. Based on Within Cluster Variation, decided digging into each by different Ks (4 to 9), and plotting each cluster by histogram, boxplot, and also a table including ‘mean’ info of each feature, especially credit score, and count of each cluster.
•	Results presented existing a possible new Tier with mean of 769 counting 30.93% of total, and probably a Merge for Tier 4 and 5(poor). 
”

BI管理与运维：
- 从零开始，开发并管理了Sisense（BI）数据仓库（ElastiCubes）、关系架构，并设计了可视化、交互式面板以分析分支机构资产组合、贷款/股份产品组合、商业服务报告、会员解决方案面板、Rogue Credit Union KPI等，为领导团队和其他利益相关者提供了可操作的洞见，提高了效率。
预测分析：呆账预测分析（高风险会员预测）
- 领导会员解决方案团队实施呆账预测分析，令人印象深刻地节省了数月时间来联系高风险会员，同时节省了10万美元以上用于雇佣更多会员解决方案专家。
- 采用KNN进行遗失值插补，特别是针对呆账观察，并使用递归特征消除进行特征选择，识别并选取关键指标，如违约、信用评分变化、循环利用、DTI、贷款历史，并通过对多数类下采样、调整网格和使用‘dplyr’和‘caret’优化RF（mtry=9）将特异性提高到94.48%。
K-均值聚类分析：新信用等级分类及探索
- 从SQL Server收集信用软拉数据，并创建了新特征，如循环余额利用率、总交易余额、DQ等。
- 使用fviz_cluster函数和‘ggplot2’可视化聚类。因机器能力问题未能成功实现‘Average Silhouette’、‘Elbow Method’找到最佳聚类。基于聚类内变异，决定通过不同的K值（4至9）深入探讨每个聚类，并通过直方图、箱线图展示每个聚类，同时制作一个表格，包括每个特征的‘mean’信息，特别是信用评分和每个聚类的数量。
- 结果呈现了一个可能的新等级，平均信用评分为769，占总数的30.93%，以及可能针对4级和5级（较差）的合并。
relational schemas是数据仓库的术语，翻译专业一点
- 从零开始，开发并管理了Sisense（BI）数据仓库（ElastiCubes）、构建了关系型模式，并设计了可视化、交互式仪表板以分析分支机构资产组合、贷款/共享产品组合、商业服务报告、会员解决方案仪表板、Rogue Credit Union关键绩效指标等，为领导团队和其他利益相关者提供了可操作的洞察，以提高效率。

•	Serves as lead to other analysts and as a subject matter expert for information needs and analysis using advanced excel and tableau. Functions as the expert in data extraction from multiple data sources using SQL for Oracle and maintaining data integrity using statistical analysis.翻译一下
- 充当其他分析师的领导，并作为高级Excel和Tableau使用中信息需求和分析的主题专家。作为从多个数据源使用Oracle SQL进行数据提取和使用统计分析维护数据完整性的专家。
翻译的符合中文习惯，并注意其中的专业术语
- 担任其他分析师的带头角色，并且在使用高级Excel和Tableau进行信息需求与分析方面充当主题专家。负责利用Oracle SQL从多个数据源中提取数据，并通过统计分析确保数据的完整性，扮演数据提取专家的角色。

•	Serves as lead to other analysts and as a subject matter expert for information needs and analysis using advanced excel and tableau. Functions as the expert in data extraction from multiple data sources using SQL for Oracle and maintaining data integrity using statistical analysis.
•	Make continuous improvements such as implement time series analysis for predicting claim counts for each underwriting group using ARIMA method of R “forecast” package.翻译一下

- 担任其他分析师的领头人，并作为使用高级Excel和Tableau进行信息需求与分析的主题专家。在使用Oracle SQL从多个数据源提取数据及通过统计分析维护数据完整性方面，充当专家角色。
- 不断改进，例如使用R语言的“forecast”包中的ARIMA方法，对每个承保组的理赔数量进行时间序列分析预测。

•	基于uplift model提升用户留存和成本优化｜通过uplift model识别对奖励敏感的用户并发放促活奖励，成功提高了《暗区突围》海外业务的D7留存率3.8%并降低了活动成本25%，同时维持了日活跃用户数（DAU）和活跃用户平均收入（ARPU）
•	在《暗区突围》海外业务初期，美国与中国区的D7留存率有显著差距，18.5%对比7.68%。我们面临的挑战是，如何通过精准的奖励发放，在提升用户活跃度和留存率的同时，避免游戏内资源过度发放带来的成本增加和游戏数值膨胀。
•	应用uplift模型，预测用户对奖励的敏感度，指导奖励发放决策,通过比较CATE，观察QINI曲线和AUUC，发现基于决策树的模型为最优。我们还计划对模型进行进一步优化，为不同类型奖励偏好的用户发放不同类型的奖励，实现更个性化的奖励发放决策
将上述三大段翻译成英文，注意英文的表达习惯，以及互联网行业，以及游戏行业，以及数据科学术语的专业

- Based on the uplift model to enhance user retention and optimize costs | By identifying users sensitive to rewards through the uplift model and issuing activation rewards, we successfully increased the D7 retention rate by 3.8% for "Dark Zone Breakout" in overseas markets and reduced event costs by 25%, while maintaining daily active users (DAU) and average revenue per active user (ARPU).
  
- In the early stages of "Dark Zone Breakout" overseas operations, there was a significant gap in the D7 retention rates between the US and China, 18.5% compared to 7.68%. Our challenge was how to use precise reward distribution to enhance user activity and retention rates while avoiding the cost increases and game value inflation brought about by excessive distribution of in-game resources.

- By applying the uplift model to predict users' sensitivity to rewards, guiding reward distribution decisions, and comparing CATE, observing QINI curves and AUUC, we found that the decision tree-based model was optimal. We also plan to further optimize the model by distributing different types of rewards to users with different types of reward preferences, achieving more personalized reward distribution decisions.
"迅速成长并领导5人的分析团队，通过与产品，工程团队协作推进分析项目，利用大数据集建模玩家行为，提供明晰且结构化的玩家画像，通过科学严谨的实验及计量统计方法验证活跃/收入增长假设，提升数据分析团队的信任度及团队形象"翻译成英文，符合英文习惯，注意英文的表达习惯，以及互联网行业，以及游戏行业，以及数据科学术语的专业，精炼成两到三句话

Quickly grew and led a team of five analysts, collaborating with product and engineering teams to advance analytical projects. Utilized large datasets to model player behavior, providing clear and structured player profiles. Validated hypotheses for active/income growth through rigorous experiments and econometric methods, enhancing the credibility and image of the data analysis team.
在精简一点，到两句话

Rapidly advanced to lead a five-person analytics team, driving projects with product and engineering to model player behavior and craft structured profiles. Validated growth hypotheses with robust experiments, boosting the data team's credibility and image.
